decisions.rationale: Account locked is preventing NID verification and asks what to do; fits general self-help unlock/fix intent.
Directly asks how to open/unlock a locked NID account; matches tag.
Mentions account lock after wrong info and asks how to fix; still a general locked-account resolution question.
NID online account is locked and asks how to open it; central tag intent.
Asks the rule/process to open a locked NID service account; clean fit.
Locked NID account and asks reset/fix method; within self-help account locked scope.
Explicit locked NID account and asks how to unlock; central example fit.
States NID account issue is lock and asks how to open; sufficiently specific and on intent.
Cannot log in because account is locked; expresses locked-account problem.
Locked shown on NID portal and asks how to proceed/retry; no wait-time or correct-info-after-lock detail.
Account lock is shown and asks requirements to unlock; relevant self-help unlock question.
Asks for guidance on NID login account lock problem; fits general solution intent.
Mentions exact account locked message online and asks what to do; clean fit.
Locked notice on NID account and asks how to fix; matches tag.
Asks unlock process for NID online locked account; on scope.
NID login is locked and asks how to restore; appropriate locked-account self-help.
States NID account is locked and asks for help, not agent action; fits general help intent.
Asks steps to solve NID login lock problem; clean match.
Wording is informal but asks how to solve NID portal login lock/block problem; fits tag.
Asks what to do to open a locked NID portal account; central intent.
NID site login is locked and asks for solution; on-topic.
Reports account lock error in NID and asks what to do; clean fit.
Focuses on whether waiting will unlock the account, which collides with wait-time/automatic unlock boundary to avoid.
Asks the way to get free from/unlock NID account lock; fits self-help locked-account scope.

result.packet_rationale: Most rows clearly mention NID account/login locked or locked notice and ask how to fix, open, unlock, restore, or what to do, so they fit the account_locked tag. The only flagged row centers on waiting to see if it unlocks, which falls into the avoided wait-time/after-lock boundary rather than the general fix/unlock intent.
